emails.subject: Re: StageCoach LOI
emails.body: Re: StageCoach LOI Gerald, This is fantastic. Exactly what we wanted. I'll have to change some of the wording in the Article 1:3 section to reflect what we are actually basing the benchmark on. It isn't a simple, one day price, it is actually a multi-year swap price beginning on the start date of the agreement. I'll make those changes and get it back to you. Andrew Gerald Nemec@ECT 02/27/2001 04:10 PM
